tesserae.name: AIO CLI
tesserae.summary: Command-line tool to scaffold and manage AIO Flutter projects — generates the aio.yaml manifest and wires in features from the AIO registry.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to create or configure an AIO app and add prebuilt features from the AIO registry.

tesserae.name: AIO Registry
tesserae.summary: Registry of AIO blueprints, templates and widgets the AIO CLI uses to scaffold app features (Firebase, Supabase, Sentry, RevenueCat…).
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to add a prebuilt integration or widget to an AIO app, or to publish a new reusable blueprint.

tesserae.name: AIO
tesserae.summary: Flutter framework providing a ready-to-launch app with core features built in, accessed through the App() class.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it when starting a new Flutter app and you want batteries-included core, networking, widgets and routing out of the box.

tesserae.name: Grévin Appcast
tesserae.summary: Appcast RSS feed (rss.xml) that forces Grévin to update to the latest version.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference for hosting a forced-update appcast feed for an app.

tesserae.name: Flair Appcast
tesserae.summary: Appcast RSS feed (rss.xml) that forces Flair to update to the latest version.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference for hosting a forced-update appcast feed for an app.

tesserae.name: Smartcleaner
tesserae.summary: Flutter app to free up phone storage by reviewing and deleting photos and videos.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference when building a media/storage-cleanup app on the AIO framework.

tesserae.name: Homee
tesserae.summary: Flutter app for sharing and organising household tasks.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference when building a shared household task-management app on the AIO framework with Supabase.

tesserae.name: Homee Appcast
tesserae.summary: Appcast RSS feed (rss.xml) that forces Homee to update to the latest version.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference for hosting a forced-update appcast feed for an app.

tesserae.name: AIO Relay
tesserae.summary: Keeps third-party API credentials server-side, letting only attested app instances (App Attest / Play Integrity) call upstream services.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to proxy upstream API calls without shipping credentials in the app, gated by binary attestation.

tesserae.name: AIO ASO
tesserae.summary: ASO keyword generator and marketing-site builder for mobile apps.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to generate App Store Optimization keywords and build a marketing site for an app launch.

tesserae.name: App Distributor
tesserae.summary: Next.js + NestJS + Supabase platform to design app-store screenshots and distribute app marketing assets.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to produce store screenshots and marketing assets for the team's apps.

tesserae.name: Animadoc
tesserae.summary: Flutter app for booking veterinary appointments, for pet owners and animal-health professionals.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reference when building an appointment-booking app on the AIO framework with Supabase.

tesserae.name: Tessera Manifest Gen
tesserae.summary: Skill that generates a valid tessera.yaml for a repo so it becomes a tile on the mosaic.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it when onboarding a repo or subfolder to Tessera, or generating/updating a tessera manifest.

tesserae.name: Tessera
tesserae.summary: Internal mosaic mapping every tool, project, skill and package the team builds.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to discover whether a tool already exists, or to onboard a new dev to what we've built.

tesserae.name: Belt
tesserae.summary: Local, Obsidian-friendly task board that Claude drains automatically, running post-task actions after each card.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to queue tasks for Claude to work through autonomously, one isolated board per project.

tesserae.name: App Spec Builder
tesserae.summary: Method to fully specify an app — actors, data model, epics→user stories, server ops — then choose a backend stack on explicit criteria.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it when scoping or modelling an app idea, writing a spec, or comparing backends (Firebase/Supabase/custom).

tesserae.name: Engram
tesserae.summary: Local, Claude-driven brain that consolidates per-project captures into a single persistent, cross-project knowledge vault in Obsidian.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to turn raw, per-project memory notes (e.g. from Belt) into a deduplicated, categorized, searchable knowledge base reusable across every project.

tesserae.name: Gridsmith
tesserae.summary: Pluggable, distributed build forge (Android + iOS) with a Postgres-only control plane, branchable onto any host that brings Postgres, S3, K8s and Mac silicon.
tesserae.whenToUse: Reach for it to queue, claim and run mobile app builds from your own host, keyed on an opaque external_ref without exposing your project model.

tesserae.name: code-linter
tesserae.summary: Un skill pour check tout ce qu'on veut pas dans le code

tesserae.name: Engram connecté à un repo pour partager
tesserae.summary: Engram connecté à un repo pour partager

tesserae.name: Check mémoire
tesserae.summary: Un skill qui analyse un dossier de mémoire de belt pour en tirer les plus pertinent pour d'autres projet et les ajouter a la base globale
